title: Are the Bluray 111 signs subtitled
wikitext:
[]: Are the Bluray 1.11 signs subtitled?             Quote Post by subAtomic » Sat Jul 03, 2010 8:06 pm I'm sure this has been answered already, but I'm about to walk out the door to buy 1.11 to take to a friend's house to watch. Are printed texts like on Katsuragi's photograph, Gendo's note, the housing application, Shinji's Room, Change of Address subtitled if you're watching the dub? A quick yes or no would be great! Thanks!

[]:             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Sat Jul 03, 2010 9:56 pm I believe so. Or at the very least some things are. Not sure. Guess you'll have to find out.

[]:             Quote Post by subAtomic » Sun Jul 04, 2010 3:11 am Thanks Eva 04. Turns out some are and some aren't, but the most important ones are.
